speed.label: Скорость
speed.critical_message: Speed critically high — risk of derailment
speed.warning_recommendation: Reduce speed gradually to within normal operating range.
speed.critical_recommendation: Apply emergency braking immediately and alert dispatcher.

temp_motor.label: Температура двигатель
temp_motor.warning_recommendation: Reduce traction load and monitor cooling system.
temp_motor.critical_recommendation: Stop the train and inspect the motor immediately.

temp_oil.label: Температура масла
temp_oil.warning_recommendation: Check oil cooling system at next stop.
temp_oil.critical_recommendation: Stop engine immediately and inspect oil system.

temp_converters.label: Температура преобразователей
temp_converters.critical_recommendation: Shut down converters and stop for inspection.

temp_air.label: Температура воздуха
temp_air.critical_recommendation: Stop and inspect air conditioning immediately.

pantograph_voltage.label: Напряжение контактной сети
pantograph_voltage.critical_message: Critical low voltage — electrical systems at risk
pantograph_voltage.warning_recommendation: Inspect pantograph and report to dispatcher.
pantograph_voltage.critical_recommendation: Switch to backup power and halt non-essential systems.

pressure_oil.label: Давление масла в двигателе
pressure_oil.critical_message: Critical oil pressure drop — engine damage imminent
pressure_oil.warning_recommendation: Check oil level at next stop.
pressure_oil.critical_recommendation: Stop engine immediately and check for oil leaks.

pressure_main_tank.label: Давление главного резервуара
pressure_main_tank.warning_recommendation: Check compressor and tank at next stop.
pressure_main_tank.critical_recommendation: Stop immediately and inspect air system.

pressure_brake.label: Давление тормозной магистрали
pressure_brake.critical_message: Critical brake pressure loss — braking impaired
pressure_brake.warning_recommendation: Check brake lines for leaks at next stop.
pressure_brake.critical_recommendation: Reduce speed immediately and perform emergency brake inspection.

pressure_air.label: Давление воздуха
pressure_air.critical_recommendation: Stop and inspect air system immediately.

tractive_force.label: Тяговое усилие
tractive_force.critical_message: Tractive force critically high — mechanical stress
tractive_force.critical_recommendation: Reduce throttle immediately to prevent traction motor damage.

fuel_liters.label: Топливо
fuel_liters.critical_message: Fuel critically low — risk of stall
fuel_liters.warning_recommendation: Plan refuel at next available stop.
fuel_liters.critical_recommendation: Stop at nearest depot for emergency refuelling.

brake_force.label: Тормозное усилие
brake_force.warning_recommendation: Check brake system at next stop.
brake_force.critical_recommendation: Inspect brakes immediately — risk of mechanical damage.
